mapper.select: SELECT workspace_id AS workspaceId, notion_api_key AS notionApiKey, github_api_key AS githubApiKey, deepseek_api_key AS deepseekApiKey, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM WorkspaceCredentials WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO WorkspaceCredentials AS Target USING (SELECT #{workspaceId} AS workspace_id) AS Source ON (Target.workspace_id = Source.workspace_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET notion_api_key = COALESCE(#{notionApiKey}, Target.notion_api_key), github_api_key = COALESCE(#{githubApiKey}, Target.github_api_key), deepseek_api_key = COALESCE(#{deepseekApiKey}, Target.deepseek_api_key), updated_at = GETUTCDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (workspace_id, notion_api_key, github_api_key, deepseek_api_key, updated_at) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{notionApiKey}, #{githubApiKey}, #{deepseekApiKey}, GETUTCDATE());
